channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: .NET Minimal APIs: A Game-Changer for Cloud-Native Applications
item.description: .NET Minimal APIs revolutionize cloud-native app development with lightweight, scalable, and secure endpoints. Discover how to build, deploy, and manage minimal APIs in your .NET projects.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Federal Cyber Leaders Share Innovation Strategies | Federal News Network
item.description: Federal cyber leaders share their strategies for delivering innovation in the federal government, from collaboration and automation to AI and machine learning.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
